Transcript: Hi, this is Marilyn Shirley calling to invite you to a very exciting event on Sunday, February 15th Jack Layton will be nominated as our federal candidate in Toronto Danforth. It begins at five PM at the upper house at 735 Queen Street East. We also plan to canvass every household in the riding earlier in the day for more information, call 416-591-5455 extension 233 Hope to see you there.
